'''鈭歝h-l-g''' ('''kachalag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbeast|unbeast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbeast|unbeast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| kachalag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichalag|thichalag]] || [[word:jichalag|jichalag]] || [[word:shichalag|shichalag]] || [[word:kichalag|kichalag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchalag|thuthuchalag]] || [[word:jujuchalag|jujuchalag]] || [[word:shushuchalag|shushuchalag]] || [[word:kukuchalag|kukuchalag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchalag|thuchalag]] || [[word:juchalag|juchalag]] || [[word:shuchalag|shuchalag]] || [[word:kuchalag|kuchalag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchalag|thuchalag]] || [[word:juchalag|juchalag]] || [[word:shuchalag|shuchalag]] || [[word:kuchalag|kuchalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechalag|thechalag]] || [[word:jechalag|jechalag]] || [[word:shechalag|shechalag]] || [[word:kechalag|kechalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochalag|thothochalag]] || [[word:jojochalag|jojochalag]] || [[word:shoshochalag|shoshochalag]] || [[word:kokochalag|kokochalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochalag|thochalag]] || [[word:jochalag|jochalag]] || [[word:shochalag|shochalag]] || [[word:kochalag|kochalag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochalag|thochalag]] || [[word:jochalag|jochalag]] || [[word:shochalag|shochalag]] || [[word:kochalag|kochalag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]] || [[word:chalag|chalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chalag|th忙chalag]] || [[word:j忙chalag|j忙chalag]] || [[word:sh忙chalag|sh忙chalag]] || [[word:k忙chalag|k忙chalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachalag|thathachalag]] || [[word:jajachalag|jajachalag]] || [[word:shashachalag|shashachalag]] || [[word:kakachalag|kakachalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachalag|thachalag]] || [[word:jachalag|jachalag]] || [[word:shachalag|shachalag]] || [[word:kachalag|kachalag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachalag|thachalag]] || [[word:jachalag|jachalag]] || [[word:shachalag|shachalag]] || [[word:kachalag|kachalag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachalag|shachalag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachalag|goshachalag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachalag|gokishachalag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachalagn眉|shachalagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachalagnkn眉|goshachalagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalagn眉|gokishachalagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachalagsh毛|shachalagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachalagnksh毛|goshachalagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachalagsh毛|gokishachalagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalagro|shachalagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalagnkro|goshachalagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalagro|gokishachalagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalagmu|shachalagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalagnkmu|goshachalagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalagmu|gokishachalagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachalagsher|shachalagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachalagnksher|goshachalagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachalagsher|gokishachalagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachalagng|shachalagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachalagnkng|goshachalagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachalagng|gokishachalagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachalagya|shachalagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachalagnkya|goshachalagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachalagya|gokishachalagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachalagyam|shachalagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachalagnkyam|goshachalagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachalagyam|gokishachalagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachalagn眉sh毛|shachalagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachalagnkn眉sh毛|goshachalagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachalagn眉sh毛|gokishachalagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalagn眉ro|shachalagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalagnkn眉ro|goshachalagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalagn眉ro|gokishachalagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalagn眉mu|shachalagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalagnkn眉mu|goshachalagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalagn眉mu|gokishachalagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachalagsh毛n眉|shachalagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachalagnksh毛n眉|goshachalagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalagsh毛n眉|gokishachalagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalagsh毛ro|shachalagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalagnksh毛ro|goshachalagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalagsh毛ro|gokishachalagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalagsh毛mu|shachalagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalagnksh毛mu|goshachalagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalagsh毛mu|gokishachalagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachalagron眉|shachalagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachalagnkron眉|goshachalagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalagron眉|gokishachalagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachalagrosh毛|shachalagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachalagnkrosh毛|goshachalagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachalagrosh毛|gokishachalagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachalagromu|shachalagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachalagnkromu|goshachalagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachalagromu|gokishachalagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachalagmun眉|shachalagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachalagnkmun眉|goshachalagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachalagmun眉|gokishachalagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachalagmush毛|shachalagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachalagnkmush毛|goshachalagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachalagmush毛|gokishachalagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachalagmuro|shachalagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachalagnkmuro|goshachalagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachalagmuro|gokishachalagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
